stories.title: Brendan Sorsby to the NFL supplemental draft? Eigh...
stories.summary: How is Sorsby suddenly in the supplemental draft? How does it work, and which teams could be interested? And what is his value after his gambling violations in college?

stories.title: Sources: Sorsby set to enter supplemental draft
stories.summary: Amid legal wrangling over his NCAA eligibility, Texas Tech transfer quarterback Brendan Sorsby plans to enter the NFL supplemental draft, sources told ESPN's Pete Thamel on Monday.

stories.title: Spain won't panic after draw with 'inferior' CV
stories.summary: Coach Luis de la Fuente insisted that tournament favorites Spain won't panic after being held to a 0-0 draw by underdogs Cape Verde.

stories.title: Dolan asked for 10-week sacrifice in April speech
stories.summary: Knicks owner James Dolan delivered an impassioned speech in front of his team before the playoffs, urging the players to "leave nothing on the table" in the pursuit of a title.

stories.title: UFC's Hokit disparages Michelle Obama at WH
stories.summary: UFC fighter Josh Hokit targeted Michelle Obama during his postfight comments at Sunday's UFC White House event, saying the former First Lady "is a man."
